messages.admin.common.name: Name
messages.admin.common.emptyCreateHint: Create your first record to get started
messages.admin.import.title: Import from URL
messages.admin.import.description: Paste a link to parse automatically. Supported: {platforms}
messages.admin.import.parseSuccess: Parsed successfully. Review the details and save.
messages.admin.cover.label: Cover image
messages.admin.cover.invalidUrl: Enter a valid image URL first
messages.admin.cover.syncTitle: Download the current URL and save it to configured storage
messages.admin.notification.title: Notifications
messages.admin.login.subtitle: Admin sign in
messages.admin.login.recoveryCodeHint: No app? Use an 8-digit recovery code
messages.admin.login.forgotDescription: Enter the admin email and the system will send a password reset link
messages.admin.login.toast.abnormal: Sign-in state is invalid. Try again.
messages.admin.reset.title: Reset password
messages.admin.reset.description: Set a new admin sign-in password.
messages.admin.reset.invalidToken: This link is invalid and missing the token parameter. Go back to sign in and request another password reset.
messages.admin.reset.passwordMin: New password must be at least 6 characters
messages.admin.reset.passwordMismatch: The two passwords do not match
messages.admin.reset.toast.success: Password reset. Returning to sign in in 3 seconds.
messages.admin.reset.missingToken: This link is missing the token parameter and cannot reset the password. Request a new link from the sign-in page.
messages.admin.reset.redirecting: Redirecting to sign in in 3 seconds...
messages.admin.notFound.title: Page not found
messages.admin.notFound.description: This page is being moved or does not exist
messages.admin.posts.toast.invalidPermalink: Permalink must include %postname%, %display_id%, or %post_id%; otherwise the post cannot be resolved.
messages.admin.posts.confirmBatchDelete: Delete {count} posts? This cannot be undone.
messages.admin.posts.columns.title: Title
messages.admin.posts.postsPerPageHint: Controls pagination size on the homepage and category/tag lists
messages.admin.posts.permalinkRedirectHintSuffix: links are redirected with 308 to the new format, so old bookmarks still work.
messages.admin.profile.toast.passwordMismatch: The two passwords do not match
messages.admin.profile.toast.secretFailed: Failed to generate secret. Try again.
messages.admin.profile.toast.setupFailed: Setup failed. Refresh the page and try again.
messages.admin.profile.toast.passkeyUnsupported: This browser does not support passkeys
messages.admin.profile.avatarSourceHint: Click an avatar to switch the frontend display source.
messages.admin.profile.sensitiveChangeHint: Changing the login username or email requires the current password and email verification code
messages.admin.profile.commonIcons: Common icons: fa-brands fa-bilibili, fa-brands fa-weixin, fa-brands fa-tiktok, fa-brands fa-xiaohongshu
messages.admin.profile.backupCodesHint: Backup codes are shown only once. Use them to sign in if you lose your authenticator. Each code can be used once.
messages.admin.profile.totpSetupHint: Scan the QR code below with an authenticator app such as Google Authenticator, 1Password, or Authy, or enter the secret manually.
messages.admin.profile.disableTotpHint: Disabling two-factor authentication requires your current password and a verification code.
messages.admin.profile.totpEnabledDescription: Two-factor authentication is enabled. You need an authenticator code each time you sign in.
messages.admin.profile.totpDescription: After enabling two-factor authentication, signing in requires both your password and an authenticator app code, which greatly improves account security.
messages.admin.profile.passkeyDescription: Passkeys use device biometrics such as fingerprint or face recognition, or a security key, to replace password sign-in.
messages.admin.profile.securityVerificationHint: Changing the login username or email requires identity verification. The code will be sent to the current email address.
messages.admin.categories.iconHint: Supports FontAwesome classes, SVG code, PNG/GIF/JPG/WebP/AVIF
messages.admin.categories.iconPlaceholder: fa-sharp fa-light fa-code, SVG code, or image URL
messages.admin.categories.keywordsPlaceholder: Separate keywords with commas, e.g. Linux, servers, ops
messages.admin.categories.confirmDeleteMessage: Posts in this category will become uncategorized. Continue?
messages.admin.tags.confirmDeleteMessage: This cannot be restored. Delete this tag?
messages.admin.pages.contentHint: HTML fragments are supported. Leave empty to restore the default sample content.
messages.admin.moments.tagManagerHint: Manage selectable keyword tags for frontend moment publishing. Tags appear in the top-right corner of cards after publishing.
messages.admin.dashboard.networkDescription: Connect to the Utterlog community to subscribe to other independent blogs, share content, and interact.
messages.admin.menus.positionHint.header: Main menu in the theme header
messages.admin.menus.azureFixedAllHint: Azure Hero fixed category tab. It is always shown on the frontend and is not saved into menu config.
messages.admin.menus.emptyAzureSidebar: No custom sidebar items yet. The frontend uses the default category list until you add items.
messages.admin.menus.empty: No menu items. Click "Add menu item" below to start.
messages.admin.settings.toast.fillBucketKeys: Fill in Bucket, Access Key, and Secret Key first
messages.admin.settings.general.brandModeHint: Show text, logo, or both in the header; only Utterlog and Flux respond
messages.admin.settings.general.subtitle: Subtitle
messages.admin.settings.general.siteLanguageHint: Loads built-in packs and locales/*.json; affects frontend lang, RSS, and admin UI
messages.admin.settings.general.siteTimezoneHint: Post dates, archives, and stats use this timezone. Leave empty to use local time. Effective: {timezone}
messages.admin.settings.general.adminEmailHint: Receives system updates and security notifications
messages.admin.settings.general.siteSinceHint: Leave empty to use the first post date. Site description and keywords are in SEO & AI.
messages.admin.aiComments.confirmReject: Reject this AI reply and keep the record?
messages.admin.aiComments.confirmDeleteRecord: Delete this queue record? Published comments will not be removed.
messages.admin.comments.columns.author: Author
messages.admin.comments.confirmPermanentDelete: This cannot be undone. Delete permanently?
messages.admin.comments.confirmMoveToTrash: The comment will move to trash. You can restore or delete it there.
messages.admin.comments.confirmBatchPermanentDele: Permanently delete {count} selected comments? This cannot be undone.
messages.admin.comments.confirmEmptyTrash: All comments in trash will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone. Empty trash?
messages.admin.links.confirm.clearCache: Clear server cache? Captcha, online counts, and other temporary cache will be rebuilt.
messages.admin.links.confirm.clearRssCache: Clear RSS subscription cache? All fetched articles will be removed and pulled again next refresh.
messages.admin.links.toast.groupDeleted: Group "{group}" deleted. {count} links moved to the default group.
messages.admin.links.columns.name: Site Name
messages.admin.links.name: Name
messages.admin.links.logoHint: Leave empty to fetch the site icon from favicon.im automatically
messages.admin.media.confirmDelete: This cannot be undone. Delete this file?
messages.admin.postEditor.toast.fillTitleOrConten: Enter a title or content first
messages.admin.postEditor.toast.noCoverUrl: Generation failed: response has no URL
messages.admin.postEditor.coverPlaceholder: Empty uses the first image in content
messages.admin.postEditor.coverHint: When set, this cover is used first. Empty falls back to the first content image.
messages.admin.postEditor.slugPlaceholder: Leave empty to assign a unique number
messages.admin.postEditor.allowRss: Allow this post in RSS aggregation
messages.admin.postEditor.noInsertData: No {type} data yet. Add it on the matching page first.
messages.admin.postEditor.aiProcessHint: Choose an AI action. You can preview and insert the result into the editor.
messages.admin.postEditor.aiEmptyHint: Choose an action above and AI will process your article content
messages.admin.editor.toolbar.heading: Heading
messages.admin.editor.previewPlaceholder: Preview area. Markdown renders here in real time...
messages.admin.aiSettings.toast.batchStarted: Started generating {count} {label} item(s) in the background
messages.admin.aiSettings.toast.stopRequested: Stop requested. The job will exit after the current request finishes.
messages.admin.aiSettings.toast.promptReset: Default prompt restored. Remember to save.
messages.admin.aiSettings.toast.providerRequired: Name, endpoint, and model are required
messages.admin.aiSettings.providers.title: AI Providers
messages.admin.aiSettings.providers.empty: No providers yet. Click the button above to add one.
messages.admin.aiSettings.providers.name: Name
messages.admin.aiSettings.routing.title: Feature Model Routing
messages.admin.aiSettings.routing.description: Assign a type=text provider to each AI feature. Leave blank to use the default provider (the type=text row with is_default=true). If a routed provider fails, the system falls back to the default chain.
messages.admin.aiSettings.routing.empty: Feature routing is not enabled in the backend yet (upgrade to v1.3+)
messages.admin.aiSettings.chat.title: Frontend Chat Bubble
messages.admin.aiSettings.chat.footer: Chat bubble = site-wide floating AI assistant on non-post pages such as home, lists, and archives. Article pages hide the bubble and use the article AI reading companion instead. The reading companion has its own context and is controlled separately.
messages.admin.aiSettings.chat.enableBubbleHint: When disabled, the round AI assistant button is hidden on all non-article pages. Article AI reading companion is not affected.
messages.admin.aiSettings.chat.allowGuest: Allow guests to use AI chat
messages.admin.aiSettings.chat.allowGuestHint: When the bubble is enabled: off means only logged-in users can send messages; guests see the bubble but are rejected. On means anyone can use it.
messages.admin.aiSettings.chat.temperatureHint: Lower is more precise; higher is more creative
messages.admin.aiSettings.posts.automationHint: When enabled, AI runs the selected tasks after publishing or updating a post
messages.admin.aiSettings.posts.imageSettingsDesc: The active backend provider is configured under the Providers tab (type=image, is_default). These parameters (ratio, style, format, quality, and text policy) are merged into the prompt or used for transcoding after upload when AI cover generation is triggered in the editor.
messages.admin.aiSettings.prompts.title: Custom Prompts
messages.admin.aiSettings.prompts.description: Text boxes are filled with the built-in prompt templates by default and can be edited directly. Saving an empty box restores the default. The Restore default button fills the current default back into the box without saving automatically. Text placeholders: {title} {content} {excerpt} {min_len} {max_len} {tags_count}. Cover image placeholders: {style}, {text_policy}, and {excerpt_block}.
messages.admin.aiSettings.prompts.restoreDefaultP: Leave empty and save to restore the default
messages.admin.aiSettings.prompts.restoreDefaultT: Fill this field with the built-in default prompt
messages.admin.aiSettings.profile.title: Blogger Profile & AI Memory
messages.admin.aiSettings.profile.description: AI uses this information to understand your writing style and preferences for more personalized responses
messages.admin.aiSettings.profile.name: Blogger name
messages.admin.aiSettings.profile.bioPlaceholder: Briefly describe your blog topics and style
messages.admin.aiSettings.profile.stylePlaceholde: Example: casual and humorous, technically rigorous, literary and fresh...
messages.admin.aiSettings.profile.memoryHint: These memories are sent to AI as context to help it understand you better
messages.admin.aiSettings.profile.memoryPlacehold: AI will automatically record your preferences and context here...
messages.admin.aiSettings.systemPrompt.title: AI System Prompt
messages.admin.aiSettings.systemPrompt.chatPrompt: Defines the AI role and behavior. Sent at the beginning of every conversation.
messages.admin.aiSettings.permissions.title: AI Data Access Permissions
messages.admin.aiSettings.permissions.description: Control which site data AI can access as context
messages.admin.aiSettings.permissions.postsHint: Titles and content of all published posts
messages.admin.aiSettings.permissions.databaseQue: Allow AI to run read-only SQL queries for additional data
messages.admin.aiSettings.batch.allDescription: Batch-generate AI summaries and reading companion questions for all published posts, skipping existing data. The job runs asynchronously in the background with an 800 ms delay between items to avoid AI rate limits.
messages.admin.aiSettings.batch.confirmClear: Clear AI summaries and reading companion questions from all posts? The next full generation will start over.
messages.admin.aiSettings.batch.summaryDescriptio: Generate summaries for published posts that do not have an AI summary. Used for post previews and SEO descriptions.
messages.admin.aiSettings.batch.questionsDescript: Generate 3 likely reader questions for posts that do not have reading companion questions.
messages.admin.aiSettings.batch.notice: Jobs run in the background and continue if this page is closed. Returning to this page shows the latest progress. Newly published posts are generated automatically by the publishing flow; this page is for filling historical data.
messages.admin.aiSettings.purpose.content.label: Content generation
messages.admin.aiSettings.purpose.content.hint: AI summaries, slugs, keywords, polishing, batch Q&A, and SQL queries all use this purpose
messages.admin.aiSettings.purpose.chat.label: Chat
messages.admin.aiSettings.purpose.chat.hint: Admin AI assistant, frontend reading companion, and Telegram /ai commands all use this purpose
messages.admin.settings.branding.footer: After uploading, it will be automatically saved to a fixed address (logo. format / dark-logo. format / favicon. format) without compression or conversion.
messages.admin.settings.beian.footer: The public security registration link is automatically generated by extracting the registration number from the registration number; the ICP registration link is fixed to beian.miit.gov.cn.
messages.admin.settings.codeInjection.footer: Insert into the page <head> tag to access third-party statistics/monitoring/verification scripts. Please only enter codes from trusted sources.
messages.admin.settings.codeInjection.headCodePla: <!-- Google Analytics / 百度统计 / Clarity 等 -->\n<script async src="https://..."></script>
messages.admin.settings.codeInjection.headCodeHin: Support any <script> / <meta> / <link> tags. It takes effect immediately after saving.
messages.admin.settings.seo.aiCrawl.footer: The generated /robots.txt will set Allow / Disallow of GPTBot / ClaudeBot / CCBot / PerplexityBot / Google-Extended according to these options.
messages.admin.settings.seo.aiCrawl.allow: Allow AI crawlers to read the site
messages.admin.settings.seo.aiCrawl.allowHint: After closing, robots.txt will reject all AI trained crawlers; ordinary search engines will not be affected.
messages.admin.settings.seo.aiCrawl.llmsTxtHint: LLM-friendly markdown indexing (title + description + article list), a new specification proposed by llmstxt.org.
messages.admin.settings.seo.aiCrawl.llmsFullHint: Contains the full markdown text of each article and is larger in size; it is recommended to enable ai_crawl_allowed at the same time to make sense.
messages.admin.settings.seo.meta.footer: A single article does not automatically use these values; the cover_url / excerpt that comes with the article will take priority.
messages.admin.settings.seo.meta.descriptionPlace: Describe the site in one sentence - used as meta description / og:description to provide the bottom line
messages.admin.settings.seo.meta.defaultImageHint: 1200x630 recommended. X / Facebook / WeChat Card Pictures.
messages.admin.settings.seo.twitter.handleHint: Prefixed with @; used for twitter:site tags.
messages.admin.settings.email.sender.name: Sender name
messages.admin.settings.email.resend.apiKeyHint: Created in API Keys of resend.com Dashboard
messages.admin.settings.email.sendflare.apiKeyHin: Created in API Keys of sendflare.com Dashboard
messages.admin.settings.email.test.description: After saving the settings, send a test email to verify whether the email service is normal.
messages.admin.settings.email.test.recipientPlace: Recipient email address (leave blank to send to administrator email address)
messages.admin.settings.telegram.noChats: Chat history not found, please send a message to the Bot first
messages.admin.settings.telegram.webhookDescripti: It is the callback address used by Telegram to push messages to your server. After setting up, the messages received by the Bot will be forwarded to your blog backend in real time for comment approval, reply and other functions. You need to save the Bot Token first, and then click "Set Webhook".
messages.admin.settings.telegram.management.reply: Just reply to the message directly
messages.admin.settings.telegram.management.aiCha: Message starting with /ai connected to AI assistant
messages.admin.settings.telegram.imageUpload.auto: Automatically upload pictures to the media library
When sending pictures via Telegram, they are automatically uploaded to the media library
messages.admin.settings.comment.switches.trustRet: If the commenter's email address or browser fingerprint has passed the review before, it will automatically pass the review.
messages.admin.settings.comment.switches.notifyAd: Notify administrator of new comments via email
messages.admin.settings.comment.order.footer: Visitors can switch by themselves in the comment area and save it locally. The initial order that has not been switched is set here.
messages.admin.settings.comment.order.defaultOrde: The initial order of visitors entering the comment area for the first time
messages.admin.settings.comment.captcha.difficult: 1-6, the bigger, the harder it is
messages.admin.settings.comment.aiAudit.footer: After enabling it, visitor comments will first be judged by AI to determine whether they are compliant, and then follow the original human-machine verification/trust path. If the AI ​​audit fails, please follow the strategy below. The prompt word can be changed in the "custom prompt word" at the bottom.
messages.admin.settings.comment.aiAudit.threshold: between 0-1. Only when the confidence returned by AI >= the threshold is passed, the higher it is, the stricter it is.
messages.admin.settings.comment.aiAudit.pending: Transfer to manual review (pending review queue)
messages.admin.settings.comment.aiReply.footer: Approved comments automatically use AI to generate replies. Auto mode publishes directly, audit mode queues for administrator review (recommended), and suggestion only displays suggestions but does not publish. The prompt word can be changed in the "Customize Prompt Word" at the bottom.
messages.admin.settings.comment.aiReply.modeAudit: Manual review mode (recommended) - queue and wait for review
messages.admin.settings.comment.aiReply.modeAuto: Fully automatic mode - publish directly after generation
messages.admin.settings.comment.aiReply.modeSugge: Suggestion only mode - queue but not publish
messages.admin.settings.comment.aiReply.badgeText: The identifier appended to the end of the AI ​​reply. Leave blank to not display. The principle of transparency recommends that the
messages.admin.settings.comment.aiReply.rateLimit: Prevent API fees from getting out of control, 0 means no limit
messages.admin.settings.comment.aiReply.delayHint: How many seconds to delay before adjusting the AI ​​after passing the review, 0 means immediately. It is recommended to wait 30-120 seconds to make the reply more natural.
messages.admin.settings.comment.aiReply.contextTi: Pass the title of the current article to AI and reply with a more relevant topic
messages.admin.settings.comment.aiReply.contextPa: When visitors reply to other people's comments, the other person's comments are passed to the AI
messages.admin.settings.comment.aiReply.onlyFirst: Only reply to the first comment on the article
After turning it on, AI will only reply once to the same article.
messages.admin.settings.media.uploadsDiskUsage: Among them, utterlog uploads file {size} (accounting for {percent}% of the host disk)
messages.admin.settings.media.driver.label: storage driver
messages.admin.settings.media.driver.localDesc: The file is saved locally on the server
messages.admin.settings.media.customDomainHint: After binding a custom domain name, all file URLs will be accessed using this domain name.
messages.admin.settings.media.r2CustomDomainHint: R2 can bind custom domain names in Cloudflare Dashboard.
messages.admin.settings.media.s3CdnHint: It is recommended to use it with CloudFront or other CDN.
messages.admin.settings.media.customDomainEmptyHi: Leave blank to use the Bucket original address.
messages.admin.settings.media.storageLimitHint: Uploading beyond this capacity will not be allowed
messages.admin.settings.media.folderRouting.descr: Specify separate storage locations for each upload category. When "Cloud" is selected, files of this category will be uploaded to the configured S3/R2; when "Local" is selected, they will always be saved locally on the server. "Follow global" is set using the storage method above.
messages.admin.settings.media.uploadLimits.allowe: One extension per line, or separated by commas
messages.admin.settings.media.uploadLimits.common: Commonly used: jpg, jpeg, png, gif, webp, svg, ico, mp4, mp3, pdf, zip, doc, docx, xls, xlsx, ppt, pptx, txt, md
messages.admin.settings.image.processing.descript: Automatically re-encode when uploading images (only PNG/JPEG input will enter the processing flow; WebP/AVIF/GIF/SVG, etc. will be saved directly)
messages.admin.settings.image.processing.webp: WebP (recommended, small size and good compatibility)
messages.admin.settings.image.processing.qualityH: Currently {quality}, 75-85 is recommended. The lower the value, the smaller the size but lower image quality (WebP / JPEG / AVIF are all valid)
messages.admin.settings.image.processing.maxWidth: Leave blank for no limit, 1920 or 2560 is recommended. Images exceeding this width will be automatically reduced proportionally (Lanczos algorithm)
messages.admin.settings.image.processing.stripExi: The encoded images themselves will never contain EXIF ​​(removed automatically by re-encoding). This switch controls whether to save the EXIF ​​metadata (camera/lens/aperture/shooting date) of the original image to the database for the front-end LazyImage to display shooting parameters. Open = not saved = not displayed in the foreground; closed = saved = displayed in the foreground
messages.admin.settings.image.random.description: When the article does not have a featured image, a random cover is automatically obtained from the API
messages.admin.settings.image.display.description: Loading animation effect of featured images and text images in front-end articles
messages.admin.settings.image.lazy.description: Images are loaded only when they enter the visible area, improving page loading speed. After closing, the picture will be downloaded immediately when the page is opened (suitable for slideshows, long screenshot archiving, etc.)
messages.admin.settings.image.lightbox.descriptio: Full-screen preview when clicking on an article image, supporting zoom, drag, keyboard navigation, and image group switching. After closing, clicking on the picture does not respond (if the picture is included in a link, it will jump according to the link)
messages.admin.settings.update.description: Utterlog pushes new versions through GitHub Releases. The following will compare the version you are currently running with the latest release in real time; when there is a new version, just click "One-Click Upgrade". The upgrade process preserves all data, configurations, and user uploads.
messages.admin.settings.image.random.typeBanner: banner - universal banner, default header image
messages.admin.settings.image.random.typeLandscap: landscape - scenery, mountains and rivers, natural scenes
messages.admin.settings.image.random.typeAnimal: animal - animals, cute pets, wild ecology
messages.admin.settings.image.random.typeSpace: space - starry sky, universe, science fiction
messages.admin.settings.image.random.customUrlHin: Or fill in the custom URL directly below
messages.admin.settings.image.random.finalUrlHint: (Can be edited directly; changing the parameters above will overwrite)
messages.admin.settings.image.random.previewLoadF: Image loading failed, please check the URL or parameters
messages.admin.settings.image.random.previewEmpty: After filling in the parameters, a preview will be displayed
messages.admin.settings.image.random.exampleDescr: Modern browsers use webp by default; Safari 17+ / Chrome 100+ optional avif is smaller in size. More detailed usage can be found at
messages.admin.security.access.requireLogin: Login is required to access the front desk
messages.admin.security.settings.geoWhitelist: Whitelist (only allow countries in the list)
messages.admin.tools.toast.needWordPressXml: Please upload the WordPress exported XML file
messages.admin.tools.confirm.wpImport: The import will clear existing articles, categories, tags, and comment data. Are you sure you want to continue?
messages.admin.tools.toast.wpImportSuccess: Imported successfully: {posts} articles, {categories} categories, {tags} tags, {comments} comments
messages.admin.tools.confirm.deleteBackup: Are you sure you want to delete this backup?
messages.admin.tools.confirm.backupImport: Importing the backup will overwrite the current data. Are you sure you want to continue?
messages.admin.tools.import.wordpress.title: WordPress import
messages.admin.tools.import.wordpress.description: Import posts, categories, tags, and comments from WordPress exported XML files
messages.admin.tools.import.typecho.title: Typecho import
messages.admin.tools.import.typecho.description: Import data from Typecho via database connection
messages.admin.tools.backup.scheduleEnabled: Automatic backup is turned on ({schedule}), backup to {destination}
messages.admin.tools.backup.scheduleOff: Automatic backup is not enabled, only manual creation is supported
messages.admin.tools.backup.includes: The backup contains: Database complete export {uploads}. {cloudNote} is automatically restored when imported.
messages.admin.tools.backup.cloudNote: Attachments are stored in the cloud, so there is no need to back them up repeatedly.
messages.admin.tools.backup.empty: There is no backup yet, click "Create Backup" to start
messages.admin.syncSites.toast.siteNameRequired: Please fill in the site name
messages.admin.syncSites.confirmDelete:
Are you sure you want to delete the site "{name}"? 

Only the authorization is deleted and the imported content is not affected. 
To delete content, please use the rollback interface.
messages.admin.syncSites.title: WordPress Sync
messages.admin.syncSites.descriptionPrefix: Authorize a WordPress site to push content to Utterlog. Each site generates an independent Site UUID + Token and installs
messages.admin.syncSites.descriptionSuffix: Just fill in the corresponding fields after plugging in. Token
messages.admin.syncSites.empty: No WordPress sites have been authorized yet.
messages.admin.syncSites.emptyHint: Click "New Authorization" above to generate the first one.
messages.admin.syncSites.job.rewrittenLinks: Links to {count} articles have been rewritten
messages.admin.syncSites.job.autoRefresh: Automatically refreshing · Every 3 seconds · Will automatically stop when completed
messages.admin.syncSites.sourceUrlHintPrefix: When the server scans the image URL in the article content, it will match the URL under this domain name.
messages.admin.syncSites.createdTitle: Authorization has been generated · Please save now
messages.admin.syncSites.tokenOnce: Token is only displayed this time
messages.admin.syncSites.tokenOnceHint: It cannot be viewed again after closing and needs to be regenerated if lost.
messages.admin.syncSites.nextStepInstallSuffix: Plug-in, fill in the settings page:
